name: ativa-dash
description: Plataforma de dashboards de marketing, vendas e integrações

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
